active.note: User-approved lightweight Harness maintenance route on the existing harness/dispatch-review-reform-v1 branch. The immutable Claude-GLM implementation prompt and human-operator dispatch receipt are prepared and checkpoint validation passes; no implementation, model dispatch, main merge, Boundary C synchronization, review, or acceptance has occurred. Boundary C remains preserved on its stage branch.

note: Fixed-path active-stage pointer. A new session reads this first to locate the active stage in one hop, without scanning reports/agent-runs/. When a stage starts, the bookkeeper sets active to {stage_id, phase, handoff, updated_at}; when the stage is accepted/merged/abandoned, active returns to null and last_completed is updated.
